svg.title: Macrogen Ibero-America · Website system flow chart
svg.desc: Diagram showing the architecture, deployment pipeline, and form routing logic for macrogen-es.com.
svg.text: ENGINEERING DESIGN PROCESS · ONE TEAM · ONE MACROGEN
How a visitor sees your website (right-to-left flow)
How a change goes live (left-to-right · under 1 minute)
How visitor requests reach the right inbox
Colors: Navy = system components · Teal = automatic processes · Pink/Red = Macrogen Chile-led · Green = LIVE state
